tasks.title: Eliminate production unwrap() calls
tasks.description: Fix 3484+ `.unwrap()` and `.expect()` instances in production code across all crates. Replace each with proper error propagation using `?` and provide meaningful error messages where applicable.
test_criteria: RunRegressionTest: verify no new .unwrap() or .expect() added via cargo clippy --all -- -D warnings
AddUnitTest: verify each replaced unwrap has proper error handling with meaningful error messages
tasks.impl_notes: Run grep first to establish baseline count, then systematically replace unwraps with proper error propagation. Consider creating a script to identify high-impact unwraps first (those in hot paths or that could panic).

tasks.title: Add cargo-llvm-cov CI gate
tasks.description: Add coverage reporting to CI with 80% line coverage threshold using `cargo llvm-cov --fail-under-lines 80`.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify CI workflow runs cargo llvm-cov and fails when coverage drops below 80%
RunTestSuite: execute cargo llvm-cov locally to verify current coverage meets threshold
tasks.impl_notes: Add to CI workflow files. Ensure cargo-llvm-cov is installed in CI environment or use action like davis/internal/cargo-llvm-cov.

tasks.title: Increase coverage to 80%+ across all crates
tasks.description: Raise test coverage to meet 80% minimum threshold across all crates.
test_criteria: RunTestSuite: execute cargo llvm-cov --fail-under-lines 80 to verify all crates meet threshold
AddRegressionTest: ensure new tests cover previously untested code paths
tasks.impl_notes: Depends on P1-001 (FR-018) - CI gate must be added first. Use cargo llvm-cov html report to identify uncovered lines.

tasks.title: Visibility audit across all crates
tasks.description: Audit public APIs and ensure consistent visibility modifiers following AGENTS.md naming conventions.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify all public APIs have consistent visibility (pub, pub(crate), etc.)
AddUnitTest: verify naming conventions for functions, types, enums, traits match AGENTS.md
tasks.impl_notes: Review each crate's lib.rs exports. Ensure internal helpers are not inadvertently made public. Check trait implementations for visibility consistency.

tasks.title: Define plugin API version stability policy
tasks.description: Document version stability guarantees and deprecation policy for plugin API in opencode-plugin crate.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify plugin API exports are clearly marked with stability annotations
AddRegressionTest: ensure breaking changes to plugin API are detected by clippy or version bump
tasks.impl_notes: Document the stability guarantees in crate documentation. Define what constitutes a breaking change vs additive change. Add deprecation notices where needed.

tasks.title: Verify WebSocket streaming capability
tasks.description: Verify routes/ws.rs provides full bidirectional WebSocket streaming vs SSE. Compare ws.rs implementation against SSE implementation.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify WebSocket connection establishes and handles bidirectional messages
AddIntegrationTest: verify WebSocket vs SSE streaming behavior difference
tasks.impl_notes: Review crates/server/src/routes/ws.rs and crates/server/src/routes/stream.rs. Verify WebSocket supports full duplex communication while SSE is unidirectional.

tasks.title: Add SDK documentation to CI
tasks.description: Add `cargo doc --no-deps` to CI pipeline for SDK documentation generation.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: verify CI runs cargo doc --no-deps without errors
AddUnitTest: verify documentation builds for all public crates
tasks.impl_notes: Reference FR-013 partial implementation. Ensure doc builds pass in CI. Consider adding --document-private-items flag if needed.

tasks.title: Add similar-asserts dev dependency
tasks.description: Add `similar-asserts = "1.5"` to dev-dependencies in ratatui-testing/Cargo.toml for visual snapshot diffing.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify similar-asserts dependency resolves and compiles
RunTestSuite: execute cargo test -p ratatui-testing to ensure no conflicts
tasks.impl_notes: Optional task - only needed if visual diffing is desired. Not critical path. Add to dev-dependencies section only.
